meaning: adj.[数](尤指树形子图)生成的
examples: The Rialto Bridge is one of the four bridges spanning the Grand Canal.
As a method of spanning space, the arch can support greater weight than a horizontal beam.
Although the study is based on plant life in Scotland, our models apply across regions spanning hundreds of thousands of square kilometers.
In a career spanning five decades, their effect on pop has still not diminished.
Most of the incentive-trust plans that Scroggin drafts are dynasty trusts generally spanning four generations.
